title: Bounds
description: Mutable axis-aligned bounding box accumulator. Starts as the empty bounds (`-Infinity..Infinity` reversed) and grows monotonically as points or rectangles are merged in via Bounds.addCoords and Bounds.addRect. Used during scene-graph traversal to accumulate a subtree's combined extent for culling and hit-testing. The Bounds.getRect accessor lazily folds the current min/max into a shared Rectangle — copy the result if you need to retain it across further accumulation.

sections.title: Import
paragraphs: Mutable axis-aligned bounding box accumulator. Starts as the empty bounds (`-Infinity..Infinity` reversed) and grows monotonically as points or rectangles are merged in via Bounds.addCoords and Bounds.addRect. Used during scene-graph traversal to accumulate a subtree's combined extent for culling and hit-testing.
The Bounds.getRect accessor lazily folds the current min/max into a shared Rectangle — copy the result if you need to retain it across further accumulation.

members.name: addCoords
members.description: Expand the bounds to include (x, y).

members.name: addRect
members.description: Expand the bounds to include rectangle. When transform is provided the rectangle's corners are transformed into the bounds' coordinate space first (via Rectangle.temp — does not mutate rectangle).

members.name: getRect
members.description: Materialize the accumulated min/max as a Rectangle. Returns the same instance across calls — copy if you need to retain it past the next mutation.

members.name: reset
members.description: Restore the empty-bounds state for reuse across frames.
